character_dossiers.name: Squire Trelawney
character_dossiers.biography: Part of a group of gentlemen who requested the narrator to document events related to Treasure Island. Described as a landowner with social standing.

character_dossiers.name: Dr. Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: Visited the narrator's father during his illness and interacted with the family. Part of the group that requested the narrator's account.

character_dossiers.name: the captain
character_dossiers.biography: A former seafarer with a sabre cut, staying at the Admiral Benbow inn. Known for his intimidating presence, rum consumption, and tales of maritime adventures. Refused to engage with strangers and maintained secrecy about his past.
